options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal_selection
options.description:
Select which goal(s) you need to reach to finish the game.

Possible values are:
- **Defeat Owlloh**
- **Climb the Tower**
- **Climb the Anxiety Tower**
- **Meet the Dog God**
options: Climb the Anxiety Tower
Climb the Tower
Defeat Owlloh
Meet the Dog God

options.name: trap_percentage
options.description: Determines the number of trap items when populating the item pool with filler.

options.name: open_wollows_hollow
options.description: Makes Wollow's Hollow accessible from the beginning without any moves needed.

options.name: cranksanity
options.description: Randomizes the locations where cranks can be found.

options.name: ratsanity
options.description:
Adds the Sanitary Zoo rats into the item and location pool.
Collecting them all is required for the zoo to be clean.

options.name: fishsanity
options.description:
Adds the purple Fish into the item and location pool.
Collecting them all is required for the Void Screw in the Zombie Chamber.

options.name: achievementsanity
options.description: Adds achievements into the location pool.

options.name: switchsanity
options.description: Adds the 4 cube switches in Some Other Place into the location pool.

options.name: test_cubesanity
options.description: Adds the 25 cubes in the Test Zone into the location pool.

options.name: movesanity
options.description:
Adds the following player moves to the item pool:
- Punch
- Climb
- Slam
- Headbutt
- Wall Jump
- Crouch
NOTE: This has as high failure rate for worlds with only few filler items or single worlds. Try regenerating or turning on Open Wollow's Hollow to help with these failures.

options.name: xp_count
options.description: The total amount of XP in the item pool.

options.name: xp_item_count
options.description: The amount of XP items in the item pool. Use this to make more space for junk (filler/trap) items.

options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
